touches.ai_summary: Inbound request received from Ravi Smith expressing interest in automation tools to improve rep productivity across their sales team.

Brief qualification call with Ravi to understand team size, current pain points, and timeline. Ravi confirmed they have 28 sales reps struggling with manual tasks and want to explore automation options.

questions_asked.question: How many sales reps are on your team?
questions_asked.answer: 28 reps across our sales org

questions_asked.question: What kind of automation capabilities do you offer?
questions_asked.answer: We provide unlimited automation for workflows, data entry, and follow-up sequencing

next_steps: Send follow-up email with case studies

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with relevant case studies from similar mid-market SaaS companies and proposed times for deeper discovery.

questions_asked.question: Do you have examples from companies in our industry?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, attached case studies from 3 SaaS companies with similar team sizes

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up call to confirm discovery logistics. Ravi mentioned they're moving quickly on this and want to have a solution in place within 60 days.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the timeline for this decision?
questions_asked.answer: We're scaling the team next quarter and need automation in place before onboarding new reps

questions_asked.question: What does implementation typically look like?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-3 weeks for setup and initial training

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call covering current tech stack, workflow pain points, and success metrics. Ravi detailed how reps spend 40% of time on manual data entry and follow-up tasks. He's the primary decision-maker but mentioned Rachel Young handles procurement.

questions_asked.question: What tools are you currently using for sales automation?
questions_asked.answer: Basic Salesforce automation, but nothing comprehensive

questions_asked.question: Who else needs to be involved in this decision?
questions_asked.answer: Rachel Young in procurement will handle contracting, but I own the technical evaluation

questions_asked.question: Can your platform integrate with Salesforce and our existing tools?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native Salesforce integration and API connections

next_steps: Map out use cases for demo

touches.ai_summary: Sent detailed discovery summary and proposed demo agenda focused on workflow automation and Salesforce integration use cases.

Technical discovery call diving into specific automation workflows. Ravi walked through their current manual processes and identified 5 key automation opportunities. Discussion of pricing structure and seat count.

questions_asked.question: How do you envision rolling this out across the team?
questions_asked.answer: All 28 reps would use it, starting with our outbound team as a pilot

questions_asked.question: How is pricing structured?
questions_asked.answer: Per seat annually, with unlimited automation included at the mid-market tier

questions_asked.question: What's the typical contract term?
questions_asked.answer: Standard is 12 months, with options for multi-year agreements

touches.ai_summary: Email recapping technical requirements and confirming proposal meeting. Included draft pricing overview for 28 seats.

questions_asked.question: Can you send the pricing breakdown ahead of our call?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, included in this email with seat-based breakdown

touches.ai_summary: Proposal review call with Ravi. Walked through pricing at list rate ($800/seat annually = $22.4k). Ravi expressed concern about budget and asked about flexibility on pricing.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on the per-seat pricing?
questions_asked.answer: We can explore volume discounts for multi-year commitments

questions_asked.question: What budget range were you expecting?
questions_asked.answer: We allocated around $17-18k for this initiative

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up proposal discussion. Ravi reiterated budget constraints and mentioned he needs to make a case internally for the higher price point. No executive sponsor identified yet.

questions_asked.question: Who would need to approve a budget increase?
questions_asked.answer: That would be our VP of Sales, but I haven't brought them in yet

questions_asked.question: What's the best discount you can offer?
questions_asked.answer: Let me discuss with my manager and get back to you

objections: Need stronger business case for executive approval

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting requested, but only Ravi and Rachel Young attended - no VP of Sales present. Discussed ROI model and business case. Rachel focused heavily on contract terms and pricing.

questions_asked.question: What ROI can we expect in the first year?
questions_asked.answer: Based on your metrics, 200+ hours saved per rep annually, approximately 3x ROI

questions_asked.question: What payment terms do you offer?
questions_asked.answer: Standard is annual upfront, but we can discuss quarterly billing

questions_asked.question: Will your VP of Sales be joining any upcoming calls?
questions_asked.answer: They're busy with quarter-end, but I'll keep them updated

touches.ai_summary: Extended proposal discussion with Ravi and Rachel. Presented revised pricing with 22.5% discount ($17,360) to meet budget. Ravi seemed relieved and indicated this would work. Rachel asked about contract flexibility and cancellation terms.

questions_asked.question: Can we do a shorter initial term to test it out?
questions_asked.answer: The discount is contingent on a 12-month commitment

questions_asked.question: What happens if we want to add more seats mid-contract?
questions_asked.answer: We can add seats anytime at the same per-seat rate, prorated

questions_asked.question: Does this pricing work within your approved budget?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, this aligns with what we have allocated

objections: Concerned about 12-month commitment without trial period

touches.ai_summary: Detailed contract review call with Rachel taking the lead. Discussed implementation timeline, support SLAs, and data security requirements. Ravi mentioned their legal team would need to review.

questions_asked.question: What does your implementation support include?
questions_asked.answer: Dedicated CSM for first 90 days plus ongoing support

questions_asked.question: Are you SOC 2 compliant?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, SOC 2 Type II certified, can provide documentation

questions_asked.question: How long does legal review typically take?
questions_asked.answer: Most customers complete in 5-7 business days

touches.ai_summary: Brief check-in call. Ravi confirmed contract is with legal and Rachel is coordinating internally. Expected to have feedback by end of week.

questions_asked.question: Any concerns from legal so far?
questions_asked.answer: Not yet, still in initial review

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email checking on legal review status and offering to address any questions or concerns that arose.
next_steps: Schedule call to discuss legal feedback

touches.ai_summary: Pricing and terms negotiation call. Legal requested minor contract amendments (standard liability caps and data processing addendum). Rachel pushed for quarterly payment terms given the discount level.

questions_asked.question: Can we split payments quarterly instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: We can do quarterly at a 5% premium to the discounted rate

questions_asked.question: Are the legal redlines standard for your contracts?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, these are our standard amendments

questions_asked.question: When can we start implementation?
questions_asked.answer: As soon as the contract is signed, typically within 3-5 days

objections: Annual payment is a cash flow concern

touches.ai_summary: Final executive alignment call - again no VP of Sales present, just Ravi and Rachel. Agreed to annual payment at discounted rate after Ravi confirmed budget was approved. Discussed implementation timeline and success metrics. Contract ready for signature pending final procurement approval.

questions_asked.question: Do we have final sign-off to proceed?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, budget is approved and legal has cleared the contract

questions_asked.question: What's the timeline from signature to go-live?
questions_asked.answer: 2-3 weeks for full implementation and training

questions_asked.question: Who will be our main point of contact during implementation?
questions_asked.answer: You'll be assigned a dedicated CSM who will reach out within 24 hours of signing

questions_asked.question: When can we expect the signed contract back?
questions_asked.answer: Rachel will route for final signatures this week, should have it back in 2-3 days

next_steps: Rachel to route contract for signatures
